name: barcode-generator-smoke-tests
description: Automated smoke tests for the 10-language barcode generator (Playwright).

scripts.test:full: npm run test:comprehensive && npm run test:review
scripts.test:launch: playwright test tests/domain-ads-config.spec.js tests/seo.spec.js tests/smoke.spec.js tests/a11y.spec.js tests/m25-account.spec.js tests/account-lifecycle.spec.js tests/bulk-account.spec.js tests/print-layout.spec.js tests/production-crawl.spec.js tests/bulk.spec.js tests/gs1.spec.js tests/two-d.spec.js tests/consent.spec.js tests/job-history.spec.js tests/template-duplicate.spec.js tests/account-analytics.spec.js tests/account-dialogs.spec.js tests/public-share-ui.spec.js --project=chromium
